scripts.build: bun run build:go && bun run build:wasm-ext && bun run --filter '@recipe/webview' build && bun run --filter '@recipe/extension' build
scripts.build:wasm-ext: GOROOT=$(go env GOROOT) && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o extension/dist/webview/recipe.wasm cmd/wasm/main.go && cp "$GOROOT/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js" extension/dist/webview/
scripts.build:wasm-web: GOROOT=$(go env GOROOT) && GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o web/public/recipe.wasm cmd/wasm/main.go && cp "$GOROOT/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js" web/public/
